holdings.infoBox: AVES is an equity ETF with a total of 1879 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASE Technology Holding stock at 1.47%, Innolux at 1.25%, LG Electronics at 1.22%, CTBC Financial Holding at 1.11%, and Unimicron Technology at 1.04%.

overview.description: The Avantis Emerging Markets Value ETF (AVES) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of emerging market equities with lower prices relative to their book values. AVES was launched on Sep 28, 2021 and is issued by American Century Investments.
